posts.title_en: Lion's Mane: Our Most Talked-About Mushroom
posts.excerpt_en: It looks like nothing else, tastes like the sea, and sells out every week. Here is how we grow it and how to cook it properly.
posts.body_en:
Lion's Mane (Hericium erinaceus) is one of the most recognisable mushrooms in the world 芒聙聰 there is nothing else that looks like it. The long white cascading spines grow outward from a single base, resembling a waterfall frozen in place. In the wild it grows on wounded or dying hardwood trees. In our grow room, we produce it year-round on supplemented sawdust blocks.

We first added Lion's Mane to our lineup in July of our first year. It was the most requested variety by restaurants 芒聙聰 chefs had been reading about it and wanted to work with it. The first flush surprised us: blocks that looked dormant for three weeks suddenly pinned overnight. Now we run it on a three-week cycle and harvest every block by hand, pulling the whole fruiting body when the spines reach about 2 cm.

### What it tastes like

The flavour is mild and sweet, with a dense, meaty texture that holds up well in a hot pan. Many people compare it to lobster or crab 芒聙聰 not in taste exactly, but in the way it absorbs butter and gives back something rich and satisfying. Slice it thick, at least 1.5 cm, and press it flat in a dry pan over medium-high heat for 3芒聙聯4 minutes per side without moving it. The outside caramelises; the inside stays juicy.

We sell it in 150g packs 芒聙聰 enough for two people as a side or one as a main. It is by far our best-selling variety among home cooks who have tried it once and come back every week.

Viipaloi se paksuksi, v脙陇hint脙陇脙陇n 1,5 cm, ja paina litte脙陇ksi kuivalle pannulle keskil脙陇mm脙露ll脙陇 3芒聙聯4 minuuttia puolelta liikuttamatta sit脙陇. posts.title_en: Spring Flush 芒聙聰 Our Best Blue Oyster Harvest Yet
posts.excerpt_en: April brought ideal humidity and the biggest Blue Oyster flush we have seen. Here is what happened and what we changed to make it happen.
posts.body_en:
Every grower waits for a flush like this. The week of April 21st, the humidity settled into a perfect 88% and temperatures held steady at 16脗掳C 芒聙聰 and the Blue Oyster responded. Within four days, every substrate block in the growing room had pinned simultaneously.

We harvested just over 60 kg across three days, our highest single-variety output since we opened. The clusters were dense and uniform, caps thin enough to saut脙漏 in under two minutes. We rushed a batch to Kauppahalli on the Tuesday morning and it sold out before noon.

### What made the difference

We made one substrate change in February 芒聙聰 adding 15% spent coffee grounds sourced from a caf脙漏 on Kauppakatu. The nitrogen boost shortens colonisation time and improves cap density during fruiting. It also cuts our substrate cost slightly.

We will repeat the same mix for the summer blocks and track the results. If the pattern holds, we plan to increase Blue Oyster production by about 30% before autumn.

Korjasimme yli 60 kg kolmen p脙陇iv脙陇n aikana 芒聙聰 korkein yhden lajikkeen tuotostomme avaamisesta l脙陇htien. Rykelmi脙陇 tuli tiiviit脙陇 ja tasaisia, lakit niin ohuet, ett脙陇 ne paistuivat alle kahdessa minuutissa. Toimitimme er脙陇n Kauppahalliin tiistaiaamuna ja se myytiin loppuun ennen puoltap脙陇iv脙陇脙陇.

### Mik脙陇 teki eron

Teimme yhden alustamuutoksen helmikuussa 芒聙聰 lis脙陇simme 15% k脙陇ytettyj脙陇 kahvinporoja Kauppakadun kahvilasta. Typpilis脙陇ys lyhent脙陇脙陇 kolonisoitumisaikaa ja parantaa lakien tiheytt脙陇 hedelm脙露ityksen aikana. Se my脙露s alentaa alustan kustannuksiamme hieman.

Toistamme saman seoksen kes脙陇lohkoille ja seuraamme tuloksia. Jos kaava pit脙陇脙陇, suunnittelemme tuotannon lis脙陇脙陇mist脙陇 noin 30% ennen syksy脙陇.

posts.title_en: Why We Switched to Compostable Packaging
posts.excerpt_en: Plastic clamshells were the easy choice. Here is why we changed, what we changed to, and what it actually costs us.
posts.body_en:
When we started, we used standard plastic clamshells. They are cheap, easy to stack, and keep moisture in. Most of the mushroom industry uses them. We used them for the first six months.

The problem was not cost or logistics 芒聙聰 it was consistency. We kept telling customers our mushrooms were grown with no chemicals, on local substrate, with the forest in mind. And then we handed them a single-use plastic container. It did not add up.

### What we use now

We now use kraft paper bags with a small ventilation window for loose mushrooms, and flat cardboard trays with a paper band for gift packs. Both are fully compostable in a home compost. The bags come from a printer in Tampere; the trays from a supplier here in Jyv脙陇skyl脙陇.

Shelf life is slightly shorter 芒聙聰 about 4 days versus 6 in plastic. We handle this by harvesting to order as much as possible and delivering more frequently. Several customers have mentioned the packaging specifically as a reason they keep buying from us.
posts.excerpt_fi: Muoviset purkit olivat helppo valinta. T脙陇ss脙陇 syy muutokseen, mit脙陇 muutimme ja mit脙陇 se todella maksaa meille.
posts.body_fi:
Aloittaessamme k脙陇ytimme tavallisia muovirasioita. Ne ovat halpoja, helposti pinottavia ja pit脙陇v脙陇t kosteuden sis脙陇ll脙陇. Suurin osa sienialan toimijoista k脙陇ytt脙陇脙陇 niit脙陇. K脙陇ytimme niit脙陇 ensimm脙陇iset kuusi kuukautta.

Ongelma ei ollut kustannuksissa tai logistiikassa 芒聙聰 se oli johdonmukaisuus. Kerroimme jatkuvasti asiakkaille, ett脙陇 sienimme kasvatetaan ilman kemikaaleja, paikallisella alustalla, mets脙陇 mieless脙陇. Ja sitten annoimme heille kertak脙陇ytt脙露muoviastian. Se ei sopinut yhteen.

### Mit脙陇 k脙陇yt脙陇mme nyt

K脙陇yt脙陇mme nyt kraftpaperipusseja pienell脙陇 tuuletusikkunalla irtosieni脙陇 varten ja litteit脙陇 pahvialustoja paperinauhalla lahjapakkauksiin. Molemmat kompostoituvat kotikomposterissa. Pussit tulevat tamperelaiselta painotalolta; alustat jyv脙陇skyl脙陇l脙陇iselt脙陇 toimittajalta.

S脙陇ilyvyysaika on hieman lyhyempi 芒聙聰 noin 4 p脙陇iv脙陇脙陇 verrattuna 6 p脙陇iv脙陇脙陇n muovissa. K脙陇sittelemme t脙陇m脙陇n korjaamalla tilauksesta niin paljon kuin mahdollista ja toimittamalla useammin. Useat asiakkaat ovat maininneet pakkauksen syyn脙陇 jatkaa ostamista.

posts.excerpt_en: Enoki loves low temperatures 芒聙聰 which makes it a natural fit for Central Finland. We added it to the lineup in January.
posts.body_en:
Enoki (Flammulina velutipes) is unusual among cultivated mushrooms: it fruits best in cold. While most of our varieties prefer 16芒聙聯20脗掳C, enoki pins most reliably between 8芒聙聯13脗掳C. For a farm in Central Finland, that is not a problem 芒聙聰 it is an advantage.

We added the first enoki blocks in January and had our first harvest by late February. The clusters came out tight and white 芒聙聰 exactly what you want. Long thin stems, tiny caps, a faint sweetness that is almost impossible to get right unless the temperature is low during fruiting.

### What to do with it

Most people know enoki from ramen, where it goes in at the last second. But it is also excellent raw in salads 芒聙聰 it stays crunchy even when dressed. Our favourite preparation: bundle a small handful, wrap tightly in a strip of bacon, and grill over medium heat. The bacon fat bastes the mushroom from outside; the inside stays crisp. Takes 10 minutes.

Lis脙陇simme ensimm脙陇iset enoki-lohkot tammikuussa ja saimme ensimm脙陇isen sadon helmikuun lopulla. Rykelm脙陇sieni脙陇 tuli tiiviit脙陇 ja valkoisia 芒聙聰 juuri sellaisia kuin halutaan. Pitk脙陇t ohuet varret, pienet lakit, hento makeus, jonka saa oikein vain kun l脙陇mp脙露tila on matala hedelm脙露ityksen aikana.

### Mit脙陇 sill脙陇 tehd脙陇

Useimmat tuntevat enokin ramenista, johon se lis脙陇t脙陇脙陇n viime hetkell脙陇. Mutta se on my脙露s erinomainen raakana salaateissa 芒聙聰 se pysyy rapeana jopa kastettuna. Suosikki valmistustapamme: niputa pieni kourallinen, k脙陇脙陇ri tukevasti pekoninsuikaleeseen ja grillaa keskil脙陇mm脙露ll脙陇. Pekonin rasva vastelee sient脙陇 ulkopuolelta; sis脙陇puoli pysyy rapeana. Vie 10 minuuttia.

posts.title_en: How a Single Grow Room Became a Farm
posts.excerpt_en: We started with one room, one variety, and no customers. Twelve months later we supply five markets across Jyv脙陇skyl脙陇.
posts.body_en:
The first grow room was a converted storage space 芒聙聰 about 12 square metres, a second-hand humidity controller, and 20 substrate blocks of Blue Oyster. We had read everything we could find about mushroom cultivation and still had no real idea what we were doing.

The first flush came after 18 days. Small clusters, a little pale from inconsistent light, but unmistakably real. We harvested about 3 kg and gave most of it away to neighbours and a restaurant on Kauppakatu who agreed to try it. The chef called back two days later to order more.

### Year one in numbers

We expanded to three rooms by May and added Lion's Mane in July. By December we were running five varieties across 80 substrate blocks per cycle. Total harvest for 2026: approximately 420 kg across all varieties.

The hardest part was not cultivation 芒聙聰 it was consistency. Customers and restaurants need to know supply will be there every week. Building that reliability took most of the year. We now harvest on a rolling two-week cycle per room, which keeps deliveries steady regardless of which blocks are peaking.

We still operate from the same building. The first grow room is still running, and it still produces our best Blue Oyster. There is something about a room that has been used for a while that makes the environment settle in.

Korjasimme noin 3 kg ja annoimme suurimman osan naapureille ja Kauppakadun ravintolalle. Kokki soitti takaisin kahden p脙陇iv脙陇n kuluttua tilatakseen lis脙陇脙陇.

### Ensimm脙陇inen vuosi luvuissa

Laajensimme kolmeen huoneeseen toukokuuhun menness脙陇 ja lis脙陇simme leijonanharjasienen hein脙陇kuussa. Joulukuuhun menness脙陇 k脙陇ytimme viitt脙陇 lajiketta 80 alustalohkolla per sykli. Kokonaissato 2026: noin 420 kg kaikissa lajikkeissa.

Vaikein osa ei ollut viljely 芒聙聰 se oli johdonmukaisuus. Asiakkaiden ja ravintoloiden on tiedett脙陇v脙陇, ett脙陇 toimitukset tulevat joka viikko. T脙陇m脙陇n luotettavuuden rakentaminen vei suurimman osan vuodesta. Nyt korjaamme kahden viikon kierrolla per huone, mik脙陇 pit脙陇脙陇 toimitukset tasaisina.

Toimimme edelleen samassa rakennuksessa. Ensimm脙陇inen kasvatushuone on edelleen k脙陇ynniss脙陇 ja tuottaa edelleen parasta sinist脙陇 osterivinokaastamme. Jossain k脙陇ytetyss脙陇 huoneessa on jotain, joka tekee ymp脙陇rist脙露st脙陇 vakiintuneen.
